creator: dev@submerge.ch
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #5)

Thanks for mentioning that, this update history is getting some funny taste!

Is there any rush to get this update in? If not I'd like to test drive it for a day or two before giving maintainer approval. Also it sounds like they added some files, have to adapt pkg-plist in that case.

Also Ardour 8.6.0 which is currently in ports is _not_ affected by these bugs, or at least not by the ones that made hot-fix releases necessary.
